Fix NoneType error: replace maybe_single with limit(1)

maybe_single() causes compatibility issues with supabase-py on Railway.
Use .limit(1) and manual extraction instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(billing): replace subscription-table projection with billing_records payment history

Management fee projection now queries billing_records directly (last 60 days) instead
of client_stripe_subscriptions. Deduplicates by client_id, takes most recent payment
amount + recurrence_type per client, then sums monthly equivalents (bi-weekly × 2.17).

This approach is fully self-contained — projection stays accurate even if
client_stripe_subscriptions drifts out of sync with Stripe.

fix: cfg ReferenceError crashing app — GlintChatPanel was outside IIFE scope

but was rendered outside the bubble IIFE where `cfg` was defined, causing
a ReferenceError on every render and a black screen.

commit.message:
feat: production-harden web scraping — retry, circuit breaker, SSE, batch mode

Complete rewrite of the web scraping system to match the PDF extraction pipeline's
production hardening level. Adds ScrapingJob model, domain rate limiting, exponential
backoff retries, GPT circuit breaker, recipe validation, deduplication, pause/resume/cancel,
SSE real-time progress streaming, batch import UI with ScrapingMonitor, and orphaned
job recovery on server restart. Targets 50K recipes/day capacity.

Fix singleton GROQ queries and null ctaHref on hero

- Target specific _id on all singleton queries (siteSettings, heroBanner,
  aboutPage) to avoid picking duplicate documents created during MCP setup
- Add || fallback for ctaLabel/ctaHref props to handle null values from Sanity
  (GROQ returns null for missing fields, bypassing TS default parameters)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: derive valid_patterns from CLI struct to eliminate maintenance trap

The hardcoded valid_patterns list in run_external (used for wrong-order
subcommand detection, e.g. 'did you mean wai add research?') required
manual updates when subcommands were added. This was a silent trap —
outdated patterns would produce incorrect suggestions.

- Add wai_subcommand_patterns() to cli.rs using clap introspection
  (same approach as wai_subcommand_names())
- Replace hardcoded list in run_external with the derived vec
- Add derived_patterns_contains_known_pairs test to pin the contract

Closes wai-st9q.

commit.message:
feat(guidance): Options A/B/C remasking mitigations + Round 4 results + Round 5 script

Implement three orthogonal remasking mitigation options for the
guidance-remasking conflict:
- Option A: fresh logits for remasking (2x model cost, --fresh-logits-remask)
- Option B: protect just-unmasked positions (zero cost, --protect-just-unmasked)
- Option C: reward-attributed confidence boosting (--attribution-boost)

Round 4 results: Option C alone failed (56% vs 69% no-remask), hard reward
mode conclusively bad (~35%). Round 5 script tests Options A and B individually.

commit.message:
feat: stderr support, fd ownership model, fd lifecycle tests (#18)

## Summary

- **Stderr support**: Add `.stderr(PIPE)` builder to `start()`,
threading stderr through the entire spawn chain (StartCtx, SpawnCtx,
SpawnCmdCtx, process substitutions)
- **Fd ownership model**: `Fd(fd, owned=False)` for borrowed fds —
`close()` is a no-op. Borrow/dup-before-use invariant: parents pass fds
without duping, only `spawn_fn` dups explicitly (fork is implicit dup
for `exec_`)
- **Replace C fd lister with Python**: `_list_fds.py` uses fstat
filtering to exclude transient `os.listdir` directory handle
- **Fd lifecycle tests**: 10 tests verifying exact fd counts during
execution (cmd, fn, pipeline, process substitutions) and zero leaks
after exit

## Test plan
- [x] `just check` passes (467 tests, pyright, ruff)
- [x] Stderr capture: single cmd, pipeline, bytes mode, raw fd
passthrough
- [x] Fd lifecycle: cmd, fn, pipeline, SubIn/SubOut redirects and args
- [x] Platform-aware pidfd assertions (Linux=1/child, macOS=0/child)
- [x] No fd leaks (conftest pluggy hook on every test)

Add Firebase Analytics with key product events

getter in lib/firebase.ts. A safe wrapper in lib/analytics.ts no-ops
on the server so it can be imported anywhere without SSR errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix admin creds dir permissions for rootless EDA access

The export_admin_creds function was setting chmod 700 on
data/certs/admin/, making it inaccessible to the rootless EDA
container. The EDA revocation playbook stats the admin cert files
as a validation step, failing with "Permission denied" before
reaching the SSH-based revocation logic. Changed to 755 so the
directory is traversable by all users while individual key files
remain at 600.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(ci): install Node before enabling corepack on bare runners

ARC self-hosted runners have no pre-installed Node, so corepack doesn't
exist on PATH. The fix is a three-step sequence:
1. setup-node (no cache) — installs Node, making corepack available
2. corepack enable — enables the yarn shim
3. setup-node (with cache: yarn) — yarn is now on PATH so cache works

GitHub-hosted runners are unaffected since Node is pre-installed there.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Adaptive Programming as 4th pillar in About section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Eliminar variable sync_completada que causaba NameError

Error:
NameError: name 'sync_completada' is not defined

Problema:
- La variable sync_completada se usaba en on_sync_complete()
- Pero no estaba definida en ese ámbito
- En Python, las funciones nested necesitan que las variables del
  ámbito enclosing estén definidas ANTES de que se defina la función

Solución:
- Eliminar completamente la variable sync_completada
- No es necesaria para el funcionamiento del botón de cerrar
- El botón se actualiza basándose en el estado de la ventana

Archivos modificados:
- sync_system.py: eliminada definición y uso de sync_completada
- windows_package/sync_system.py: eliminado uso de sync_completada

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
